Model before rewriting:

letting n_nurses be 4
letting NURSE be domain int(1..(n_nurses))
letting DAY be domain int(0..6)
letting SHIFT be domain int(0..3)
letting morning be 0
letting afternoon be 1
letting overnight be 2
letting dayoff be 3
letting Demand be [[1,0,1,0;int(0..3)],[0,2,1,0;int(0..3)],[1,2,1,0;int(0..3)],[1,1,0,0;int(0..3)],[2,0,1,0;int(0..3)],[1,1,1,0;int(0..3)],[0,2,0,0;int(0..3)];int(0..6)]
find Roster: matrix indexed by [DAY, NURSE] of SHIFT

such that

and([ and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = s) | n : NURSE ]) >= Demand[d, s] | s : SHIFT ]) | d : DAY ]),
and([ or([ Roster[d, n] = dayoff | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ or([ Roster[d, n] = overnight | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = morning) | d : DAY ]) <= 4 | n : NURSE ]),
and([ and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = s) | n : NURSE ]) < (n_nurses / 2) | s : SHIFT ]) | d : DAY ]),
and([ and([ (Roster[d, n] = overnight) -> (or([Roster[sum([d,1;int(1..)]) % 7, n] = overnight,Roster[sum([d,1;int(1..)]) % 7, n] = dayoff;int(1..)])) | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = overnight) | d : DAY ]) <= sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = morning) | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ])

--

and([ and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = s) | n : NURSE ]) >= Demand[d, s] | s : SHIFT ]) | d : DAY ]),
and([ or([ Roster[d, n] = dayoff | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ or([ Roster[d, n] = overnight | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = morning) | d : DAY ]) <= 4 | n : NURSE ]),
and([ and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = s) | n : NURSE ]) < (n_nurses / 2) | s : SHIFT ]) | d : DAY ]),
and([ and([ (Roster[d, n] = overnight) -> (or([Roster[sum([d,1;int(1..)]) % 7, n] = overnight,Roster[sum([d,1;int(1..)]) % 7, n] = dayoff;int(1..)])) | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = overnight) | d : DAY ]) <= sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = morning) | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ])
   ~~> constant_evaluator ([("Constant", 9001)])
and([ and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = s) | n : NURSE ]) >= Demand[d, s] | s : SHIFT ]) | d : DAY ]),
and([ or([ Roster[d, n] = dayoff | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ or([ Roster[d, n] = overnight | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = morning) | d : DAY ]) <= 4 | n : NURSE ]),
and([ and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = s) | n : NURSE ]) < 2 | s : SHIFT ]) | d : DAY ]),
and([ and([ (Roster[d, n] = overnight) -> (or([Roster[sum([d,1;int(1..)]) % 7, n] = overnight,Roster[sum([d,1;int(1..)]) % 7, n] = dayoff;int(1..)])) | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ]),
and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = overnight) | d : DAY ]) <= sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = morning) | d : DAY ]) | n : NURSE ])

and([ and([ sum([ toInt(Roster[d, n] = s) | n : NURSE ]) >= Demand[d, s] | s : SHIFT ]) | d : DAY ])
   ~~> merge_nested_ac_comprehensions ([("Base", 8900)])
